segments.text: He was only gone for around two months.
He'll have still been playing with anyone who can take him online, I'm sure.
And he has done a big Japanese tournament only last week.
The guy should be relatively fresh.

full_text: He was only gone for around two months. He'll have still been playing with anyone who can take him online, I'm sure. And he has done a big Japanese tournament only last week. The guy should be relatively fresh.
